bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the undergraduate "Wishlist" event for the Fall 2026 semester has been released.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an 'Eco-Friendly Cafeteria' initiative to promote sustainable and environmentally conscious choices among its community.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for the BRAC University law alumni association has taken charge, serving for the 2026–2028 term.
